name: NutritionColours Clinical Data API
description: Evidence-based clinical nutrition data feeds for AI search engines, researchers, and developers.

dataset.name: Clinical Conditions Database
dataset.description: 8 metabolic conditions with root causes, biomarkers, therapeutic spices, and ontology references.

dataset.name: Herbal Database
dataset.description: 9 therapeutic herbs and spices with active compounds, dosages, contraindications, and ontology references.

dataset.name: Citation Metadata
dataset.description: How to properly attribute NutritionColours clinical data in AI citations and academic references.

dataset.name: Population Health Metrics
dataset.description: Anonymous aggregate health metrics from user calculator interactions.

dataset.name: Answer Fragments
dataset.description: Curated question-to-fragment mappings for AI answer engine extraction.
